title: Shona Wilson
compiled_truth: Shona Wilson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-06-21), Shona Wilson sent 208 and received 738 emails, totalling 946 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (164), [Chris Abel](people/chris-abel) (55), [Mike Jordan](people/mike-jordan) (51), [Kristin Albrecht](people/kristin-albrecht) (47), [James New](people/james-new) (41).
